mapper.sql: id, member_id, order_number, status_id, payment_id, total_amount, shipping_amount, tax_amount, discount_amount, shipping_address, billing_address, recipient_name, recipient_phone, recipient_email, delivery_method, city, town, address, store_name, store_address, coupon_id, discount_type, discount_value, notes, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( member_id, order_number, status_id, payment_id, total_amount, shipping_amount, tax_amount, discount_amount, shipping_address, billing_address, recipient_name, recipient_phone, recipient_email, delivery_method, city, town, address, store_name, store_address, coupon_id, discount_type, discount_value, notes, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{orderNumber}, #{statusId}, #{paymentId}, #{totalAmount}, #{shippingAmount}, #{taxAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{shippingAddress}, #{billingAddress}, #{recipientName}, #{recipientPhone}, #{recipientEmail}, #{deliveryMethod}, #{city}, #{town}, #{address}, #{storeName}, #{storeAddress}, #{couponId}, #{discountType}, #{discountValue}, #{notes}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status_id = #{statusId}, payment_id = #{paymentId}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, shipping_amount = #{shippingAmount}, tax_amount = #{taxAmount}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, shipping_address = #{shippingAddress}, billing_address = #{billingAddress}, recipient_name = #{recipientName}, recipient_phone = #{recipientPhone}, recipient_email = #{recipientEmail}, delivery_method = #{deliveryMethod}, city = #{city}, town = #{town}, address = #{address}, store_name = #{storeName}, store_address = #{storeAddress}, coupon_id = #{couponId}, discount_type = #{discountType}, discount_value = #{discountValue}, notes = #{notes}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status_id = #{statusId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM orders WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber}
